testcase.name: shouldReturnEmptyPageWhenNoProductsExist

failure.message: Expecting empty but was: [Product{id=1, name='Laptop', description='High-performance laptop', price=999.99, quantity=10}, Product{id=2, name='Smartphone', description='Latest smartphone model', price=699.99, quantity=15}, Product{id=3, name='Tablet', description='10-inch tablet', price=299.99, quantity=20}, Product{id=4, name='Headphones', description='Wireless noise-canceling headphones', price=199.99, quantity=25}, Product{id=5, name='Mouse', description='Wireless optical mouse', price=29.99, quantity=50}]

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError:
Expecting empty but was: [Product{id=1, name='Laptop', description='High-performance laptop', price=999.99, quantity=10}, Product{id=2, name='Smartphone', description='Latest smartphone model', price=699.99, quantity=15}, Product{id=3, name='Tablet', description='10-inch tablet', price=299.99, quantity=20}, Product{id=4, name='Headphones', description='Wireless noise-canceling headphones', price=199.99, quantity=25}, Product{id=5, name='Mouse', description='Wireless optical mouse', price=29.99, quantity=50}] at com.demo.springboot.repository.ProductRepositoryTest$PaginationTests.shouldReturnEmptyPageWhenNoProductsExist(ProductRepositoryTest.java:223) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:21:58 [main] INFO o.s.t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils - Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.demo.springboot.repository.ProductRepositoryTest$PaginationTests]: PaginationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2025-07-26 23:21:58 [main] INFO o.s.b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper - Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.demo.springboot.SpringbootGrpcRestDemoApplication for test class com.demo.springboot.repository.ProductRepositoryTest$PaginationTests 2025-07-26 23:21:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.orm.jpa.JpaTransactionManager - Creating new transaction with name [com.demo.springboot.repository.ProductRepositoryTest$PaginationTests.shouldReturnEmptyPageWhenNoProductsExist]: PROPAGATION_REQUIRED,ISOLATION_DEFAULT 2025-07-26 23:21:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.orm.jpa.JpaTransactionManager - select p1_0.id, p1_0.description, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.quantity from products p1_0 offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.description, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.quantity from products p1_0 offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only 2025-07-26 23:21:58 [main] TRACE org.hibernate.orm.jdbc.bind - testcase.name: shouldFindProductsWithPagination
testcase.failure:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError:
expected: 3L but was: 8L at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.java:77) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.java:45) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstanceWithCaller(Constructor.java:499) at com.demo.springboot.repository.ProductRepositoryTest$PaginationTests.shouldFindProductsWithPagination(ProductRepositoryTest.java:185) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:21:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.orm.jpa.JpaTransactionManager - Creating new transaction with name [com.demo.springboot.repository.ProductRepositoryTest$PaginationTests.shouldFindProductsWithPagination]: PROPAGATION_REQUIRED,ISOLATION_DEFAULT 2025-07-26 23:21:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.orm.jpa.JpaTransactionManager - Opened new EntityManager [SessionImpl(179141342<open>)] for JPA transaction 2025-07-26 23:21:58 [main] DEBUG o.s.orm.jpa.JpaTransactionManager - Exposing JPA transaction as JDBC [org.springframework.orm.jpa.vendor.HibernateJpaDialect$HibernateConnectionHandle@770635f8] 2025-07-26 23:21:58 [main] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - testcase.name: shouldFindSecondPageOfProducts

failure.message: Expected size: 1 but was: 2 in: [Product{id=3, name='Tablet', description='10-inch tablet', price=299.99, quantity=20}, Product{id=4, name='Headphones', description='Wireless noise-canceling headphones', price=199.99, quantity=25}]

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError:
Expected size: 1 but was: 2 in: [Product{id=3, name='Tablet', description='10-inch tablet', price=299.99, quantity=20}, Product{id=4, name='Headphones', description='Wireless noise-canceling headphones', price=199.99, quantity=25}] at com.demo.springboot.repository.ProductRepositoryTest$PaginationTests.shouldFindSecondPageOfProducts(ProductRepositoryTest.java:206) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
